title: Decide checkout/2 vs start_owner!/2 for a LiveView test
prompt: A LiveView test spawns background tasks via `assign_async/3` that may outlive the test process briefly during teardown. Write a new setup function at `test/support/live_view_case.ex` that uses `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.start_owner!/2` (NOT `checkout/2`) and registers an `on_exit` for `stop_owner`. Include a comment above the setup block explaining why `start_owner!` is preferred over `checkout/2` for this module (hint: unlinked processes spawned by assign_async may outlive the test process).
tier_rationale: Requires knowing both APIs and making a justified choice — Sonnet often defaults to checkout.
research_citation: "`start_owner!/2` solves the problem of unlinked processes started in a test outliving the test process and causing ownership errors" — Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox docs
